# Skill Index

**Auto-generated by `scripts/build-skills-index.py`** from each SKILL.md's YAML frontmatter. Do not edit by hand — rerun the script after adding or changing a skill. CI / pre-commit can run `--check` to flag drift.

Grouped by `phase`. Each row links to the authoritative `SKILL.md` and shows what the skill builds on (`composes`), when not to use it (paraphrased from `conflicts_with`), and a one-line description (first sentence of the SKILL's `description:` field).

## Conventions captured in frontmatter

Every SKILL.md declares: `name`, `description`, `phase`, `composes`, `conflicts_with`. Phase values: `setup`, `capture`, `planning`, `drafting`, `review`, `submission`, `inspection`. Validate the catalog with:

```bash
python scripts/skill-graph.py --validate-only
python scripts/skill-graph.py --format mermaid > dependency-graph.md
```

Activity is logged in each proposal's `working/activity.md` (no separate skill log). Aggregate across proposals with `python scripts/skill-stats.py`.

## Setup (one-time + per-proposal bootstrap)

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [import-from-capture](.claude/skills/import-from-capture/SKILL.md) | `setup-company` | if no capture-pipeline export exists, use new-proposal instead | Import a fully-qualified opportunity from the capture-pipeline and scaffold a proposal workspace pre-populated with solicitation facts, Go/No-Go assessment, customer POCs, and competitive intel. |
| [new-proposal](.claude/skills/new-proposal/SKILL.md) | `setup-company` | if you have a capture-pipeline JSON export, use import-from-capture instead | Scaffold a new proposal directory from the standard template. |
| [setup-company](.claude/skills/setup-company/SKILL.md) | — | _(no peer — one-time setup; no peer skills)_ | One-time setup that creates the my-company/ directory with company-specific boilerplate files (company description, capabilities, contract vehicles, past performance, capture profile, brand palette). |

## Capture (pre-bid analysis)

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [capture-intent](.claude/skills/capture-intent/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager`, `customer-intel`, `competitor-assessment` | _(no peer — unique strategic layer; complements competitor-assessment, doesn't duplicate)_ | Use this skill early in the proposal lifecycle to define the strategic intent behind the bid, including customer belief objectives, discriminator strategy, competitive posture, acceptable risk, and narrative direction. |
| [capture-portal-structure](.claude/skills/capture-portal-structure/SKILL.md) | `opportunity-quick-look` | _(no peer — only producer of portal-format.md; only runs for web-form submissions)_ | Capture the section structure, character/word limits, metadata fields, and submission mechanics of a web-form submission portal before drafting. |
| [capture-scorecard](.claude/skills/capture-scorecard/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager`, `competitor-assessment`, `customer-intel` | requires proposal-plan.md and competitor-assessment; use opportunity-quick-look for fresh-solicitation triage | Use this skill to assess capture readiness across 9 dimensions before committing proposal resources. |
| [competitor-assessment](.claude/skills/competitor-assessment/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager` | _(no peer — ghosting language; complements capture-intent's strategic posture)_ | Use this skill to identify likely competitors, profile each one, build a weighted Bidder Comparison Chart, identify teaming gaps, and generate win strategy statements. |
| [customer-intel](.claude/skills/customer-intel/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager` | _(no peer — unique research role; capture-intent uses customer beliefs but doesn't produce them)_ | Use this skill to research and profile the customer before writing begins. |
| [opportunity-quick-look](.claude/skills/opportunity-quick-look/SKILL.md) | — | this is raw-solicitation triage; once proposal-manager has run, use capture-scorecard | Use this skill to rapidly vet a new opportunity before committing to full proposal analysis. |
| [submission-summary](.claude/skills/submission-summary/SKILL.md) | `opportunity-quick-look`, `capture-portal-structure` | _(no peer — proposal-manager consumes this as its authoritative response-requirements source rather than re-extracting)_ | Use this skill immediately after a solicitation is in hand to produce a one-page summary of exactly what the customer requires us to submit — response format, volume/section structure, page or word limits, pricing artifact, due date, and submission mechanics — before any planning or generation begins. |

## Planning and architecture

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [narrative-spine](.claude/skills/narrative-spine/SKILL.md) | `proposal-solution-architect`, `capture-intent` | _(no peer — complements proposal-storyboard — the spine is the lengthwise argument; the storyboard is the crosswise per-section plan)_ | Use this skill after solution architecture and capture intent to write the proposal's narrative spine — a one-page, plain-prose argument of what the proposal claims and why it is compelling against the customer's actual problem — for human sign-off before storyboarding or drafting begins. |
| [proposal-manager](.claude/skills/proposal-manager/SKILL.md) | `opportunity-quick-look`, `capture-portal-structure` | _(no peer — central planning hub; sole producer of proposal-plan.md + compliance-matrix seed)_ | Use this skill to analyze a solicitation and build a proposal plan before solution design begins. |
| [proposal-solution-architect](.claude/skills/proposal-solution-architect/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager` | _(no peer — unique architecture role)_ | Use this skill when analyzing a solicitation or white paper task to build requirements matrices, capability mappings, solution strategies, and architecture concepts. |

## Drafting

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [past-performance](.claude/skills/past-performance/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager` | _(no peer — unique drafting role)_ | Use this skill to map your company's past performance repository to current evaluation criteria, identify the most relevant entries, draft PPQ-style narratives, and produce a past performance volume or section. |
| [pricing-analyst](.claude/skills/pricing-analyst/SKILL.md) | `proposal-solution-architect`, `proposal-manager` | _(no peer — dispatch on pricing_artifact yields one artifact per type; no peer)_ | Develop the pricing artifact appropriate to the proposal type (ROM, SBIR budget, OTA milestones, CSO commercial pricing, or FAR cost volume). |
| [proposal-editor](.claude/skills/proposal-editor/SKILL.md) | `proposal-writer` | don't re-derive claims or invent proof points; that's proposal-writer's job | Polish proposal-writer drafts into evaluator-friendly prose without breaking compliance or evidence traceability. |
| [proposal-graphics](.claude/skills/proposal-graphics/SKILL.md) | `proposal-storyboard`, `proposal-solution-architect` | _(no peer — unique visual role)_ | Use this skill to create proposal-ready architecture graphics, anchor graphics, and figure concepts with PowerPoint/Figma-ready structure. |
| [proposal-storyboard](.claude/skills/proposal-storyboard/SKILL.md) | `proposal-solution-architect`, `capture-intent`, `competitor-assessment` | _(no peer — unique pre-prose planning role)_ | Use this skill after proposal-solution-architect and before proposal-writer to create section-by-section storyboards that define evaluator questions, required answers, proof points, graphics, target length, and prohibited claims before prose drafting begins. |
| [proposal-writer](.claude/skills/proposal-writer/SKILL.md) | `narrative-spine`, `proposal-storyboard`, `proposal-solution-architect`, `capture-intent` | don't run a separate style/compression pass; that's proposal-editor's job | Draft evaluator-ready proposal sections from the approved narrative spine and solution architecture, in two passes — draft-loose (confident, in-voice prose) then bind (evidence, verification, compliance). |

## Review

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [compliance-check](.claude/skills/compliance-check/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager`, `proposal-writer` | don't score proposal quality; that's red-team-review's job | Diff requirements against draft coverage and update the compliance matrix. |
| [evidence-check](.claude/skills/evidence-check/SKILL.md) | `proposal-writer` | _(no peer — complementary to compliance-check; both feed red-team-review)_ | Audit draft evidence citations against my-company/evidence-ledger.json — flag CLAIM-UNSUPPORTED, typos, retired/restricted IDs. |
| [red-team-review](.claude/skills/red-team-review/SKILL.md) | `compliance-check`, `evidence-check`, `technical-review` | don't re-run compliance coverage or engineering feasibility; consume their outputs | Score drafts against evaluator rubrics from a GS-14 perspective — narrative quality (red), mock S/W/D rating (gold), final QA (white-glove). |
| [technical-review](.claude/skills/technical-review/SKILL.md) | `proposal-storyboard`, `proposal-solution-architect`, `proposal-editor` | don't produce adjectival ratings or pWin; that's red-team-review --mode=gold | Validate technical feasibility and claim realism (architecture, integration, ATO/cyber). |

## Submission and post-submit

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [capture-submission](.claude/skills/capture-submission/SKILL.md) | `proposal-writer`, `export-proposal` | _(no peer — unique post-submit calibration capture)_ | Use this skill to snapshot a proposal's auto-generated draft and final submitted version into the calibration corpus, with edit notes. |
| [export-proposal](.claude/skills/export-proposal/SKILL.md) | `proposal-editor`, `red-team-review`, `proposal-graphics` | _(no peer — unique submission-packaging role)_ | Package proposal deliverables into native Microsoft Office formats (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) for review cycles and final submission. |

## Inspection (read-only)

| Skill | Composes on | Don't use when | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [dashboard](.claude/skills/dashboard/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager`, `compliance-check`, `evidence-check` | portfolio-wide Streamlit; use status for per-proposal CLI summary | Launch the local read-only Streamlit dashboard that shows portfolio-wide proposal state (compliance coverage, evidence coverage, Gold Team pWin, AI spend) by reading the v1.5 JSON sidecars produced by proposal-manager, compliance-check, and evidence-check. |
| [status](.claude/skills/status/SKILL.md) | `proposal-manager`, `compliance-check` | per-proposal CLI summary; use dashboard for portfolio-wide view | Show the current state of the active proposal — proposal type, stages completed, open compliance gaps, and the next recommended command. |
